Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 154 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 129 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 23 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 103 upvotes, 10 comments
  5. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 45 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 289 upvotes, 51 comments
  7. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 752 upvotes, 157 comments
  8. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 80 upvotes, 12 comments
  9. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 144 upvotes, 28 comments
  10. Modern Generic SVGA driver for Windows 3.1 42 upvotes, 6 comments
  11. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 44 upvotes, 7 comments
  12. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 290 upvotes, 86 comments
  13. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 193 upvotes, 57 comments
  14. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  15. Components of a Coding Agent 234 upvotes, 76 comments
  16. Advice to young people, the lies I tell myself (2024) 108 upvotes, 31 comments
  17. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 22 upvotes, 3 comments
  18. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 156 upvotes, 51 comments
  19. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 433 upvotes, 192 comments
  20. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 642 upvotes, 306 comments
  21. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 70 upvotes, 27 comments
  22. Unverified: What Practitioners Post About OCR, Agents, and Tables 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 159 upvotes, 78 comments
  24. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 31 upvotes, 10 comments
  25. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 52 upvotes, 24 comments
  26. Show HN: OsintRadar – Curated directory for osint tools 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Dynamics of (Not) Being Perceived: Grief and Relief After Leaving Social Media 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 258 upvotes, 197 comments
  29. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 88 upvotes, 76 comments
  30. Elizabeth I's Manuscript of Pierre Boaistuau's Histoires Prodigieuses (1559) 3 upvotes, 1 comments

Last generated 6:00pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
